result.stdout:
Description:
  Type dependency analyzer for C# assemblies

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  init            Initialize a new analysis session
  add <dll-path>  Add a DLL to the current analysis session
  generate        Generate the dependency graph from added DLLs
  export          Export the generated dependency graph
  query           Query the generated dependency graph
  suggest         Suggest DLL files based on .csproj files found in the directory tree

commands.payload:
Description:
  Type dependency analyzer for C# assemblies

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  init            Initialize a new analysis session
  add <dll-path>  Add a DLL to the current analysis session
  generate        Generate the dependency graph from added DLLs
  export          Export the generated dependency graph
  query           Query the generated dependency graph
  suggest         Suggest DLL files based on .csproj files found in the directory tree

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a DLL to the current analysis session

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli add <dll-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <dll-path>  Path to the DLL file to add

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Export the generated dependency graph

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli export [options]

Options:
  format, -f <format>  Output format (dot, json, or mermaid)
  output, -o <output>  Output file path
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Query the generated dependency graph

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli query [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  dependents-of <type-name>               Find all types that depend on the specified type
  dependencies-of <type-name>             Find all types that the specified type depends on
  dependents <count-expression>           Find types with a specific dependent count
  dependencies <count-expression>         Find types with a specific dependency count
  transitive-dependencies-of <type-name>  Find all types that a type depends on (recursively)
  transitive-dependents-of <type-name>    Find all types that depend on a type (recursively)
  circular-dependencies                   Find all circular dependency cycles

  dependencies-of <type-name>             Find all types that the specified type depends on
  dependents <count-expression>           Find types with a specific dependent count
  dependencies <count-expression>         Find types with a specific dependency count
  transitive-dependencies-of <type-name>  Find all types that a type depends on (recursively)
  transitive-dependents-of <type-name>    Find all types that depend on a type (recursively)
  circular-dependencies                   Find all circular dependency cycles

result.stdout:
Description:
  Find all circular dependency cycles

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli query circular-dependencies [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Find types with a specific dependency count

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli query dependencies <count-expression> [options]

Arguments:
  <count-expression>  Count expression (e.g., 5, >5, >=5, <5, <=5, 2-10)

Options:
  detailed, -d    Show detailed output with additional count information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Suggest DLL files based on .csproj files found in the directory tree

Usage:
  TypeDependencies.Cli suggest [options]

Options:
  directory, -d <directory>  Directory to search for .csproj files (defaults to current directory)
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
